column3: Generate plan.json and .task/TASK-*.json for roadmap Phase 2: Python DrissionPage 4.2 call migration. Consume all exploration findings, keep task count practical, and write outputs under .workflow/scratch/20260514-plan-P2-python-drissionpage-42-migration.
column11: [E1] autobrowser.py: remove private MixTab import, use Protocol/Any, preserve runtime behavior; main.py: evaluate edge=True only for Edge and leave other browser paths explicit; use_system_user.py signature ok, do not execute save. [E2] Phase 2 verification: uv lock --check, import/signature probe, uv run mypy ., static no private DrissionPage imports; real browser smoke deferred to Phase 3. [E3] README/CLAUDE/specs need updates for 4.2 beta, no private DrissionPage modules, userscripts unaffected; do not claim real smoke passed. [E4] Risks: beta API, Edge path behavior, config write side effects, click.middle real-browser dependency, preserving browsing strategy and no new deps.
